messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Develop a python-pptx script for a 20-slide data-heavy presentation on Hospital Efficiency KPIs aimed at Chief Medical Officers. Include clinical heat maps and quarterly trend lines. Save as "Hospital_KPIs.pptx". The entire presentation must be in English using a 16:9 Widescreen orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import ChartData


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Hospital_KPIs.pptx"

HEADER_COLOR = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x5C)
ACCENT_COLOR = RGBColor(0x00, 0x79, 0x6B)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
BODY_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x2D, 0x2D)
MUTED_TEXT = RGBColor(0x80, 0x80, 0x80)
LIGHT_BG = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF7, 0xFA)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Arial"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.4)

CARD_WIDTH = Inches(2.8)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.6)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.15)


# ── Helper Functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=BODY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name or FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, value, subtitle=""):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    card_shape.fill.solid()
    card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = CARD_BG
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.12), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4), title, font_size=11, bold=True, color=MUTED_TEXT)
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), value, font_size=28, bold=True, color=ACCENT_COLOR)

    if subtitle:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(1.1), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4), subtitle, font_size=10, color=MUTED_TEXT)


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    banner = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.8), SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(1), Inches(1.5))
    banner.fill.solid()
    banner.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
    banner.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.0), Inches(12), Inches(1.2), text, font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.05), SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(1), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)
    line.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.1), Inches(4), Inches(0.35), "Hospital Efficiency KPIs", font_size=9, color=MUTED_TEXT)
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(2), Inches(7.1), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.35), f"Slide {slide_num}", font_size=9, color=MUTED_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEC, 0xF1)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.4), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.8), "Image Placeholder", font_size=14, color=MUTED_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2, color=RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0), width=Pt(1)):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y1, x2, y2)
    connector.line.color.rgb = color
    connector.line.width = width


def add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, title_text, categories, series_list, left, top, width, height):
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories

    for series_name, values in series_list:
        chart_data.add_series(series_name, tuple(values))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = title_text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, left, Inches(0.3), width, Inches(0.5), title_text, font_size=24, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    return chart_frame


def add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, title_text, categories, series_list, left, top, width, height):
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories

    for series_name, values in series_list:
        chart_data.add_series(series_name, tuple(values))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = title_text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, left, Inches(0.3), width, Inches(0.5), title_text, font_size=24, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    return chart_frame


def add_pie_chart(slide, title_text, categories, values, left, top, width, height):
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories
    chart_data.add_series("Satisfaction", tuple(values))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_label_format = plot.data_labels
    data_label_format.show_percentage = True

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = title_text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, left, Inches(0.3), width, Inches(0.5), title_text, font_size=24, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    return chart_frame


def add_heatmap_grid(slide, categories_x, categories_y, values, left, top, cell_width, cell_height):
    for row_idx, y_cat in enumerate(categories_y):
        for col_idx, x_cat in enumerate(categories_x):
            val = values[row_idx][col_idx]
            color_val = RGBColor(0x00, 0x79, 0x6B) if val >= 8 else (RGBColor(0xFF, 0xB3, 0x47) if val >= 5 else RGBColor(0xE5, 0x73, 0x73))
            cell = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + col_idx * cell_width, top + row_idx * cell_height, cell_width - Pt(2), cell_height - Pt(2))
            cell.fill.solid()
            cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = color_val
            cell.line.color.rgb = WHITE

            add_text_box(slide, left + col_idx * cell_width + Inches(0.15), top + row_idx * cell_height + Inches(0.3), cell_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4), str(val), font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for col_idx, x_cat in enumerate(categories_x):
        add_text_box(slide, left + col_idx * cell_width + Inches(0.15), top - Inches(0.4), cell_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.35), x_cat, font_size=12, bold=True, color=DARK_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for row_idx, y_cat in enumerate(categories_y):
        add_text_box(slide, left - Inches(0.8), top + row_idx * cell_height + Inches(0.3), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), y_cat, font_size=12, bold=True, color=DARK_GRAY)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, HEADER_COLOR)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.5), "Hospital Efficiency KPIs", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(9.8), Inches(3.7), ACCENT_COLOR, Pt(3))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Quarterly Performance Review for Chief Medical Officers", font_size=22, color=RGBColor(0xB0, 0xC4, 0xDE), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(10), Inches(0.5), "FY 2024 — Confidential", font_size=16, color=MUTED_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.6), "Executive Summary", font_size=32, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    metrics = [
        ("Avg LOS", "4.8 days", "-0.3 days vs prior year"),
        ("Bed Occupancy", "78.5%", "+2.1% improvement"),
        ("Readmission Rate", "12.3%", "-1.8% reduction"),
        ("Patient Satisfaction", "91.2%", "Top quartile performance"),
    ]

    for i, (title, value, subtitle) in enumerate(metrics):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 3.1)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(1.4), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title, value, subtitle)


def slide_03_section_dept(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)
    add_section_label(slide, "Departmental Performance Overview")
    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_04_er_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Avg Wait Time (min)", [58, 52, 47, 44]),
        ("Throughput Rate (pts/hr)", [12.4, 13.1, 14.0, 14.8]),
        ("Diversion Rate (%)", [8.2, 6.5, 5.1, 4.3]),
    ]

    add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, "Emergency Department — Quarterly Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_05_icu_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Bed Occupancy (%)", [85.2, 87.1, 89.4, 91.0]),
        ("Mortality Rate (%)", [6.8, 6.2, 5.9, 5.5]),
        ("Ventilator Days (avg)", [4.2, 3.8, 3.5, 3.1]),
    ]

    add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, "Intensive Care Unit — Quarterly Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_06_surgery_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("OR Utilization (%)", [72.5, 76.8, 80.2, 83.1]),
        ("Case Volume (thousands)", [18.2, 19.5, 20.8, 22.1]),
        ("Cancellation Rate (%)", [4.5, 3.8, 3.2, 2.7]),
    ]

    add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, "Surgery Department — Quarterly Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_07_radiology_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Turnaround Time (hrs)", [28.5, 24.2, 20.8, 18.3]),
        ("CT Utilization (%)", [76.3, 79.1, 82.4, 85.0]),
        ("MRI Utilization (%)", [71.8, 74.5, 77.2, 80.1]),
    ]

    add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, "Radiology — Quarterly Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_08_pharmacy_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Cost Per Patient ($)", [850, 820, 795, 770]),
        ("Med Adherence Rate (%)", [68.5, 71.2, 74.8, 77.3]),
        ("Generic Dispensing (%)", [72.1, 74.5, 76.8, 79.2]),
    ]

    add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, "Pharmacy Services — Quarterly Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_09_cardiology_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Cath Lab Utilization (%)", [78.5, 80.2, 82.6, 85.1]),
        ("Door-to-Balloon (min)", [68, 62, 58, 54]),
        ("PCI Volume (cases)", [320, 345, 372, 398]),
    ]

    add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, "Cardiology — Quarterly Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_10_oncology_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Treatment Cycles (thousands)", [4.8, 5.2, 5.7, 6.1]),
        ("Survival Rate (%)", [72.3, 73.1, 74.0, 75.2]),
        ("Chemo Adherence (%)", [81.5, 83.2, 85.0, 86.8]),
    ]

    add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, "Oncology — Quarterly Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_11_pediatrics_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Admissions (thousands)", [8.5, 9.1, 7.8, 8.9]),
        ("Vaccination Rate (%)", [86.2, 87.5, 88.3, 89.1]),
        ("ER Visits (thousands)", [14.2, 15.0, 13.8, 14.5]),
    ]

    add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, "Pediatrics — Quarterly Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_12_section_financial(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)
    add_section_label(slide, "Financial Performance Overview")
    add_footer(slide, 12)


def slide_13_revenue_per_bed(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["ER", "ICU", "Surgery", "Radiology", "Cardio"]
    series_list = [
        ("Revenue Per Bed ($K)", [145, 280, 310, 195, 265]),
    ]

    add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, "Revenue Per Bed by Department", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(7.0), Inches(4.5))

    metrics = [
        ("Total Revenue", "$284M", "+6.3% YoY"),
        ("Avg Revenue/Bed", "$239K", "+$12K improvement"),
        ("Cost Efficiency", "94.2%", "Top quartile"),
    ]

    for i, (title, value, subtitle) in enumerate(metrics):
        left = Inches(8.0 + i * 1.6)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), CARD_HEIGHT, title, value, subtitle)


def slide_14_cost_per_patient(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("ER Cost/Patient ($)", [1850, 1790, 1720, 1680]),
        ("ICU Cost/Patient ($)", [12400, 11800, 11200, 10600]),
        ("Surgery Cost/Patient ($)", [8900, 8500, 8100, 7800]),
    ]

    add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, "Cost Per Patient by Department", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_15_quality_indicators(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Readmission Rate (%)", [15.8, 14.2, 13.0, 12.3]),
        ("HAI Rate (per 1K)", [3.2, 2.8, 2.5, 2.1]),
    ]

    add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, "Quality Indicators — Readmission & Infection Control", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.5))

    categories_bar = ["ER", "ICU", "Surgery", "Medicine"]
    series_bar = [("HAI Rate (per 1K)", [2.8, 3.5, 2.1, 2.4])]
    add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, "Hospital-Acquired Infections by Unit", categories_bar, series_bar, Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5))


def slide_16_operational_efficiency(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_list = [
        ("Avg LOS (days)", [5.1, 5.0, 4.9, 4.8]),
        ("Discharge Time (hrs)", [6.2, 5.8, 5.4, 5.0]),
    ]

    add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, "Operational Efficiency — LOS & Discharge Trends", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.5))

    categories_bar = ["ER", "Medicine", "Surgery", "ICU"]
    series_bar = [("Discharge Time (hrs)", [7.2, 5.8, 4.5, 6.1])]
    add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, "Discharge Time by Unit", categories_bar, series_bar, Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5))


def slide_17_staffing_ratios(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories = ["ER", "ICU", "Medicine", "Surgery", "Pediatrics"]
    series_list = [
        ("Nurse-to-Patient Ratio", [1.0, 0.5, 1.0, 0.75, 1.0]),
        ("Target Ratio", [1.0, 0.5, 1.0, 0.75, 1.0]),
    ]

    add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, "Nurse-to-Patient Ratios by Unit", categories, series_list, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(12.3), Inches(5.8))


def slide_18_wait_time_heatmap(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Wait Time Heat Map — Average Minutes by Department & Quarter"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.6), "Wait Time Heat Map", font_size=28, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    categories_x = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    categories_y = ["ER", "ICU", "Surgery", "Radiology", "Cardiology"]
    values = [
        [58, 52, 47, 44],
        [32, 28, 25, 22],
        [45, 40, 36, 31],
        [28, 24, 20, 18],
        [38, 34, 30, 27],
    ]

    add_heatmap_grid(slide, categories_x, categories_y, values, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.9))


def slide_19_patient_satisfaction(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    categories_pie = ["Excellent", "Good", "Average", "Poor"]
    values_pie = [42.5, 31.8, 18.7, 7.0]
    add_pie_chart(slide, "Patient Satisfaction Distribution — Q4 2024", categories_pie, values_pie, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(5.0))

    metrics = [
        ("Overall Score", "91.2%", "Top quartile"),
        ("NPS Score", "+72", "+8 pts YoY"),
        ("Complaints", "142", "-23% reduction"),
    ]

    for i, (title, value, subtitle) in enumerate(metrics):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.0)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), CARD_HEIGHT, title, value, subtitle)


def slide_20_recommendations(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Key Recommendations"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.6), "Key Recommendations", font_size=32, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    recommendations = [
        ("Expand ICU Capacity", "Projected 91% occupancy requires additional beds by Q2"),
        ("Optimize OR Scheduling", "Target 85% utilization through better case mix management"),
        ("Reduce Readmissions", "Implement post-discharge follow-up program for high-risk patients"),
        ("Improve ER Throughput", "Deploy triage optimization and fast-track protocols"),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.3)
    for title, desc in recommendations:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y_pos, Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4), f"▸ {title}", font_size=16, bold=True, color=ACCENT_COLOR)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.5), y_pos + Inches(0.05), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), desc, font_size=14, color=DARK_GRAY)
        y_pos += Inches(1.2)

    add_line(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(6.3), Inches(12.5), Inches(6.3), ACCENT_COLOR, Pt(2))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(6.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.4), "Thank you — Questions & Discussion", font_size=20, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_section_dept(prs)
    slide_04_er_metrics(prs)
    slide_05_icu_metrics(prs)
    slide_06_surgery_metrics(prs)
    slide_07_radiology_metrics(prs)
    slide_08_pharmacy_metrics(prs)
    slide_09_cardiology_metrics(prs)
    slide_10_oncology_metrics(prs)
    slide_11_pediatrics_metrics(prs)
    slide_12_section_financial(prs)
    slide_13_revenue_per_bed(prs)
    slide_14_cost_per_patient(prs)
    slide_15_quality_indicators(prs)
    slide_16_operational_efficiency(prs)
    slide_17_staffing_ratios(prs)
    slide_18_wait_time_heatmap(prs)
    slide_19_patient_satisfaction(prs)
    slide_20_recommendations(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
